errors.disableAllMany: Failed to disable {{count}} of {{enabled}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

title: Scheduler Heartbeats
description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.
empty: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

confirm.disableAllOne: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agent?
confirm.disableAllMany: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled agents?

general.title: General
general.description: Configure instance-wide defaults that affect how operator-visible logs are displayed.

censorUsername.title: Censor username in logs
censorUsername.description: Hide the username segment in home-directory paths and similar operator-visible log output. Standalone username mentions outside of paths are not yet masked in the live transcript view. This is off by default.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt into features that are still being evaluated before they become default behavior.

isolatedWorkspaces.title: Enable Isolated Workspaces
isolatedWorkspaces.description: Show execution workspace controls in project configuration and allow isolated workspace behavior for new and existing issue runs.

autoRestart.title: Auto-Restart Dev Server When Idle
autoRestart.description: In `pnpm dev:once`, wait for all queued and running local agent runs to finish, then restart the server automatically when backend changes or migrations make the current boot stale.
